parameters.name: dat
parameters.label: Input Data DAT
parameters.description: An alternative table to be used in place of an input table.

parameters.name: datexpr
parameters.label: Expressions DAT
parameters.description: An alternative table to be used in place of a formula table.

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output
parameters.description: Determines what format will be used for output from the .

parameters.name: expr
parameters.label: Expression
parameters.description: used to evaluate each cell if an input or is not supplied.

parameters.name: outputsize
parameters.label: Output Table Size
parameters.description: If the Output Table Size parameter is Strings, Expressions, or Commands, and there is a second input, you can choose the output table size to be either Input or the Formula .  If the Formula is chosen

parameters.name: dependency
parameters.label: Monitor Data Dependencies
parameters.description: If the Output parameter is set to Strings or Expressions, the will monitor any nodes used by the data, as well as check for time dependencies, and cook accordingly. This toggle is on by default. If yo

parameters.name: backslash
parameters.label: Convert Backslash Characters
parameters.description: Will convert things like \n to newlines, \t to tabs etc. Note that \n, \t will be converted to spaces if the input is a table.

parameters.name: xfirstrow
parameters.label: Exclude First Row
parameters.description: Forces the first row to be selected even if it is not specified by the Select Rows settings.

parameters.name: xfirstcol
parameters.label: Exclude First Col
parameters.description: Forces the first column to be selected even if it is not specified by the Select Cols settings.

parameters.name: extractrows
parameters.label: Select Rows
parameters.description: This parameter allows you to pick different ways of specifying the rows selected.

parameters.name: rownamestart
parameters.label: Start Row Name
parameters.description: Specify the row name to start the selection range from.

parameters.name: rowindexstart
parameters.label: Start Row Index
parameters.description: Specify the row index to start the selection range from.

parameters.name: rownameend
parameters.label: End Row  Name
parameters.description: Specify the row name to end the selection range.

parameters.name: rowindexend
parameters.label: End Row Index
parameters.description: Specify the row index to end the selection range.

parameters.name: rownames
parameters.label: Row Select Values
parameters.description: Specify actual row names that you want to select. You can use pattern matching, for example will select all the rows names row1 thru row4.

parameters.name: rowexpr
parameters.label: Row Select Condition
parameters.description: Specify an expression that will be evaluated.  If the expression evaluates to true, the row will be selected.

parameters.name: fromcol
parameters.label: From Column
parameters.description: When selecting rows by values, this parameter selects which column to use when matching cell values to Selected Row Values to determine which rows are selected.

parameters.name: extractcols
parameters.label: Select Cols
parameters.description: This parameter allows you to pick different ways of specifying the columns selected.

parameters.name: colnamestart
parameters.label: Start Col Name
parameters.description: Specify the column name to start the selection range from.

parameters.name: colindexstart
parameters.label: Start Col Index
parameters.description: Specify the column index to start the selection range from.

parameters.name: colnameend
parameters.label: End Col Name
parameters.description: Specify the column name to end the selection range.

parameters.name: colindexend
parameters.label: End Col Index
parameters.description: Specify the column index to end the selection range.

parameters.name: colnames
parameters.label: Col Select Values
parameters.description: Specify actual column names that you want to select. You can use pattern matching, for example will select all the columns named colvalue1 thru colvalue4.

parameters.name: colexpr
parameters.label: Col Select Condition
parameters.description: Specify an expression that will be evaluated. If the expression evaluates to true, the column will be selected. See Row Select Condition for more details.

parameters.name: fromrow
parameters.label: From Row
parameters.description: When extracting columns by Specified Names, this parameter selects which row to use when matching cell values to Selected Col Values to determine which columns are selected.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: customext
parameters.label: Custom Extension
parameters.description: Specifiy the custom extension.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.
